explanation: Ear cytology and flush is an upcoded version of simple ear cytology
Weight check is a component of wellness exam, not a separate billable procedure
Venipuncture is the simple blood draw, IV catheter placement is more complex and not needed for routine wellness
Single view is insufficient for fracture assessment; multiple views are standard of care
Comprehensive metabolic panel is excessive for routine wellness where urinalysis would suffice
WBC count alone cannot be billed when CBC panel is performed
RBC count alone cannot be billed when CBC panel is performed
Liver enzyme test is included in comprehensive metabolic panel
Kidney function test is included in comprehensive metabolic panel
